d.t: Gặp người mới ở quán cà phê

e.p: Hi, what's your name?
e.m: 1) Nói tên của bạn. 2) Nói thành phố bạn sống.
e.h: Present Simple: My name is..., I live in...
e.s: I'm [studentName]. I live in [studentCity].

e.p: Do you come here often?
e.m: 1) Nói tần suất bạn đến quán (often/not often). 2) Nói lý do ngắn gọn.
e.s: I don't come here often because I live far. I come when I need a quiet place to study.

e.p: How do you like the coffee here?
e.m: 1) Nói cảm xúc về cà phê (like/dislike). 2) Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.s: I like it because the coffee is strong and warm. It tastes better than I expected.

e.p: Do you want to hang out this weekend?
e.m: 1) Trả lời đồng ý hoặc không bằng 'I'm going to' hoặc 'I will'. 2) Nói khi cụ thể hoặc lý do.
e.h: Future: I'm going to / I will + verb
e.s: I'm going to hang out on Saturday afternoon. I will meet a friend at the park.

e.p: Some people say 'break the ice' at parties. What does it mean?
e.m: 1) Giải thích ý nghĩa đơn giản của thành ngữ. 2) Kể một lần bạn làm điều đó (Past Simple).
e.s: It means to start a small talk so people feel comfortable. I broke the ice last month by telling a short joke at a meeting.

d.t: Nói chuyện nhỏ ở bữa tiệc

e.p: Nice party, right?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có đồng ý hay không. 2) Nói một lý do ngắn (âm nhạc/đồ ăn).
e.h: Use 'Yes, it is' or 'No, it's not' + because
e.s: Yes, it is because the music is fun. The food is really tasty.

e.p: Do you know anyone here?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có quen ai ở đó không. 2) Nói mối quan hệ ngắn (friend/colleague).
e.h: Present Simple: I know / I don't know
e.s: I know a few people here. One is a colleague from my office.

e.p: Someone said this song came 'out of the blue'. What does that mean?
e.m: 1) Giải thích thành ngữ ngắn gọn. 2) Nói một lần chuyện xảy ra bất ngờ với bạn (Past Simple).
e.h: Explain 'out of the blue' + Past Simple
e.s: It means something happened suddenly without warning. It happened to me when a friend called me out of the blue last week.

e.p: Can you introduce me to your friend?
e.m: 1) Đồng ý/không đồng ý giới thiệu (will/going to). 2) Nói tên người ấy hoặc mối liên hệ.
e.h: Use 'I will' or 'I'm going to' + name/relationship
e.s: I will introduce you to Anna. She is my classmate.

e.p: People sometimes say 'let's call it a night'. When would you use this?
e.m: 1) Giải thích khi nào dùng câu nói đó. 2) Nói điều bạn sẽ làm sau đó (future simple).
e.s: You say it when the party is ending and people are ready to leave. I will go home and rest.

d.t: Giới thiệu bản thân trong buổi học

e.p: Can you tell the class your name?
e.m: 1) Nói tên bạn. 2) Nói trường hoặc nghề nghiệp ngắn.
e.h: Present Simple: My name is..., I study/work at...
e.s: I'm [studentName]. I study at [studentSchool].

e.p: How do you feel about today's lesson?
e.m: 1) Nói cảm xúc hiện tại (excited/nervous). 2) Nói lý do ngắn.
e.s: I'm excited because the topic is new. I want to learn more.

e.p: A classmate used the word 'give it a shot'. What does it mean?
e.m: 1) Giải thích thành ngữ đơn giản. 2) Nói bạn đã 'gave it a shot' khi nào (Past Simple).
e.s: It means to try something even if it's hard. I gave it a shot last month when I tried a difficult exercise.

e.p: Will you join the group study tomorrow?
e.m: 1) Trả lời yes/no bằng 'I'm going to' hoặc 'I will'. 2) Nói thời gian hoặc lý do ngắn.
e.h: Future: I'm going to / I will + reason/time
e.s: I'm going to join at 4 pm. I need to prepare for the exam.

e.p: Which activity is better for learning: reading or practice?
e.m: 1) Nói lựa chọn của bạn (comparative). 2) Nêu lý do ngắn, có connector 'because' hoặc 'and'.
e.s: Practice is better than just reading because it helps me remember. It makes learning more active.

d.t: Nói về sở thích và tiếng lóng đơn giản

e.p: What do you like to do in your free time?
e.m: 1) Nói 1 hoạt động bạn thích. 2) Nói tần suất (often/sometimes).
e.s: I like to listen to music. I do it often in the evenings.

e.p: A friend said 'let's hang out'. What does that mean?
e.m: 1) Giải thích ngắn 'hang out'. 2) Nói nơi bạn thường 'hang out' (place).
e.s: It means to spend time together casually. I usually hang out at the cafe near my home.

e.p: Do you prefer watching movies or playing sports?
e.m: 1) Nói lựa chọn. 2) Nêu lý do ngắn với 'because'.
e.s: I prefer watching movies because they help me relax. I watch them on weekends.

e.p: Someone told you 'that was a piece of cake' after your task. What does it mean?
e.m: 1) Giải thích thành ngữ. 2) Nói bạn cảm thấy thế nào về lời khen (present).
e.s: It means the task was very easy. I feel proud when people say that.

e.p: Will you try a new hobby next month?
e.m: 1) Trả lời dự định bằng 'I'm going to' hoặc 'I will'. 2) Nói hobby và lý do ngắn.
e.s: I'm going to try painting next month. I want to relax and improve my skills.

d.t: Ăn ngoài và dùng tiếng lóng khi order

e.p: What would you like to order?
e.m: 1) Nói món bạn muốn. 2) Nói nếu bạn muốn it spicy or not (no/yes).
e.h: Present Simple: I want / I'd like + food
e.s: I would like a chicken sandwich. Please make it not spicy.

e.p: The waiter asked if everything is 'okay'. How do you reply?
e.m: 1) Nói cảm nhận về món. 2) Nếu không ổn, nêu vấn đề ngắn (too salty/etc.).
e.s: Yes, it's very tasty. The soup is a bit too salty.

e.p: Friend said 'this place is lit' — what does 'lit' mean here?
e.m: 1) Giải thích 'lit' ngắn. 2) Nêu lý do tại sao bạn nghĩ vậy (music/food).
e.s: It means the place is exciting and fun. The music and good food make it lit.

e.p: Can you split the bill?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn sẽ trả phần của mình. 2) Nói bạn sẽ dùng cash or card.
e.s: I will pay my share. I'll use a card.

e.p: Should we tip the server here?
e.m: 1) Nói ý kiến ngắn (should/shouldn't). 2) Nêu mức hoặc lý do ngắn.
e.s: We should give a small tip because the service was good. Five percent is fine.

d.t: Du lịch và khác biệt văn hoá đơn giản

e.p: Where are you going on holiday?
e.m: 1) Nói điểm đến. 2) Nói duration ngắn (a few days/week).
e.h: Present Continuous or 'I'm going to' + time
e.s: I'm going to the beach next week. I will stay for three days.

e.p: A local told you to 'take off your shoes' at a house. What should you do?
e.m: 1) Nói hành động bạn sẽ làm. 2) Nói lý do ngắn (respect/custom).
e.h: Use 'I will' or 'I have to' + reason
e.s: I will take off my shoes at the door. I do it to respect their custom.

e.p: You heard someone say 'the food is out of this world'. What does that mean?
e.m: 1) Giải thích thành ngữ đơn giản. 2) Nói nếu bạn đồng ý (yes/no) và lý do.
e.s: It means the food is extremely good. I agree because the flavors were strong and fresh.

e.p: Do you need to buy a ticket now or later?
e.m: 1) Nói kế hoạch mua vé (now/later). 2) Nói lý do ngắn (price/check).
e.h: Use 'I'm going to' or 'I will' + reason
e.s: I'm going to buy it now because prices may go up. I don't want to risk a sellout.

e.p: When you meet someone from another culture, what must you do?
e.m: 1) Nói một điều bạn phải làm (must/have to). 2) Giải thích ngắn vì sao.
e.s: You must be polite and listen carefully. It shows respect and helps avoid mistakes.

d.t: Mua sắm và dùng tiếng lóng khi mặc cả

e.p: How much is this shirt?
e.m: 1) Hỏi giá hoặc trả lời giá (If seller). 2) Nói bạn có trả bằng cash or card.
e.h: Present Simple: It is + price / I will pay by...
e.s: This shirt is twenty dollars. I will pay by card.

e.p: Can you give me a discount?
e.m: 1) Nói xin giảm giá ngắn. 2) Nêu lý do hoặc đề xuất giá mới.
e.h: Use 'Can you' + reason and offer a price
e.s: Can you give me a discount because I'm buying two? I can pay fifteen each.

e.p: A friend said the price is 'a steal'. What does that mean?
e.m: 1) Giải thích 'a steal'. 2) Nói nếu bạn sẽ mua (yes/no) và lý do.
e.s: It means the price is very good and cheap. I will buy it because it's a great deal.

e.p: Do you prefer shopping online or in-store?
e.m: 1) Nói lựa chọn. 2) Nêu lý do so sánh ngắn (more comfortable/cheaper).
e.s: Online shopping is more convenient than going to a store. It's cheaper and saves time.

e.p: If the size doesn't fit, what will you do?
e.m: 1) Nói kế hoạch (return/exchange) bằng 'I will' hoặc 'I have to'. 2) Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use 'I will' or 'I have to' + because
e.s: I will exchange it for a bigger size. I have to make sure it fits well.

d.t: Khen ngợi và phản hồi bằng tiếng lóng thân thiện

e.p: You did great on that presentation!
e.m: 1) Cảm ơn và nhận lời khen ngắn. 2) Nói bạn cảm thấy thế nào (proud/relieved).
e.h: Present Simple: Thank you + I feel...
e.s: Thank you, I appreciate it. I feel proud of my work.

e.p: A friend says 'you're killing it' — how do you respond?
e.m: 1) Giải thích bạn hiểu câu đó thế nào. 2) Nói bạn sẽ làm gì tiếp theo (future).
e.h: Explain + Future Simple 'I will' or 'I'm going to'
e.s: I understand it means I'm doing very well. I will keep working hard.

e.p: Someone said your idea is 'cool'. What does that mean?
e.m: 1) Giải thích 'cool' ngắn. 2) Nói bạn cảm ơn và sẽ làm tiếp (short future).
e.s: It means the idea is good and interesting. Thanks, I will try to improve it.

e.p: Should I add more details to my report?
e.m: 1) Trả lời nên/không nên bằng 'You should' hoặc 'You don't have to'. 2) Nói lý do ngắn.
e.s: You should add more details because it makes your point clearer. It helps the reader understand.

e.p: Which is better for a team: being strict or being relaxed?
e.m: 1) Nói lựa chọn và dùng comparative. 2) Nêu lý do ngắn, nối bằng 'and' hoặc 'but'.
e.s: Being relaxed is better than being strict because it builds trust. But rules are needed too.

d.t: Cách xin lỗi và sửa lỗi bằng ngôn ngữ thông dụng

e.p: I'm sorry I was late.
e.m: 1) Nhận lỗi ngắn và xin lỗi. 2) Nói lý do ngắn (past).
e.s: I'm sorry, I was late. My bus was delayed.

e.p: Someone said 'my bad' after a mistake. What does it mean?
e.m: 1) Giải thích 'my bad' đơn giản. 2) Nói bạn sẽ làm gì để sửa lỗi (future).
e.s: It means 'my mistake' or 'I'm sorry'. I will fix it tomorrow.

e.p: Do you have to finish the task today?
e.m: 1) Trả lời 'have to' or 'don't have to'. 2) Nói lý do ngắn hoặc kế hoạch.
e.h: Use 'I have to' / 'I don't have to' + because
e.s: I have to finish it today because the deadline is tonight. I will stay late to complete it.

e.p: A colleague said 'no worries' — how do you respond?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn cảm thấy thế nào (relieved/ok). 2) Nói bạn sẽ chú ý hơn (future).
e.s: I feel relieved that it's okay. I will be more careful next time.

e.p: If you broke something at a friend's house, what must you do?
e.m: 1) Nói việc bạn phải làm bằng 'must' (apologize/replace). 2) Nói lý do ngắn.
e.s: You must apologize and offer to replace it. It is fair and respectful.

d.t: Nói về một sự kiện bất ngờ trong quá khứ

e.p: Did anything surprising happen to you recently?
e.m: 1) Nói việc bất ngờ đã xảy ra (Past Simple). 2) Nói cảm xúc ngay sau đó.
e.s: A friend called me out of the blue last week. I was very surprised.

e.p: Someone said 'I was blown away' — what does that mean?
e.m: 1) Giải thích cụm từ đơn giản. 2) Nêu ví dụ bạn 'were blown away' trước đây (Past Simple).
e.s: It means you were very impressed. I was blown away by a concert last year.

e.p: How did you react when it happened?
e.m: 1) Nói phản ứng đầu tiên (Past Simple). 2) Nói bạn đã làm gì tiếp theo (then + Past Simple).
e.s: I smiled and said thank you. Then I called my family to tell them.

e.p: Would you tell this story again at a party?
e.m: 1) Trả lời yes/no bằng 'I will' hoặc 'I wouldn't'. 2) Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.s: I will tell it because it's funny and short. People like surprising stories.

e.p: Is this story better or worse than others you've heard?
e.m: 1) So sánh ngắn (better/worse). 2) Nêu lý do với 'because' hoặc 'and'.
e.s: This story is better than most because it was unexpected and funny. It grabbed attention.

d.t: Giao tiếp thân mật nơi làm việc

e.p: Morning! How was your weekend?
e.m: 1) Nói ngắn về cuối tuần (Past Simple). 2) Nói cảm xúc hiện tại (tired/relaxed).
e.s: I went to the beach on Saturday. I'm relaxed today.

e.p: A coworker said 'I'll cover you' — what does that mean?
e.m: 1) Giải thích cụm từ đơn giản. 2) Nói bạn sẽ cảm ơn bằng cách nào (short future).
e.s: It means they will take your shift or task. I will say thanks and return the favor.

e.p: Can you finish this report by tomorrow?
e.m: 1) Trả lời có/không bằng 'I will' hoặc 'I can't'. 2) Nói lý do ngắn hoặc kế hoạch.
e.h: Use 'I will' / 'I can't' + because or plan
e.s: I will finish it by tomorrow because I have free time tonight. I'll send it in the morning.

e.p: Which team is more productive: ours or theirs?
e.m: 1) So sánh ngắn (more/less). 2) Nêu lý do ngắn và kết luận bằng 'so'.
e.s: Our team is more productive than theirs because we plan well. So we meet deadlines better.

e.p: If a problem appears, what should we do first?
e.m: 1) Nêu việc cần làm trước bằng 'We should' or 'You should'. 2) Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.s: We should talk to the team and find the cause. It helps to fix the problem quickly.

d.t: Kể chuyện ngắn về thời thơ ấu dùng tiếng lóng nhẹ

e.p: Tell me a fun thing you did as a kid.
e.m: 1) Mô tả việc bạn làm (Past Simple). 2) Nói cảm xúc khi nhớ lại (present).
e.s: I climbed a big tree near my house when I was a kid. I feel happy when I remember it.

e.p: A friend said 'that was epic' about your story. What does 'epic' mean?
e.m: 1) Giải thích 'epic' đơn giản. 2) Nói bạn có đồng ý (yes/no) và vì sao.
e.s: It means very great or impressive. I agree because the memory was exciting.

e.p: Did you ever get in trouble for that?
e.m: 1) Nói có/không (Past Simple). 2) Nói hậu quả ngắn (what happened next).
e.s: Yes, I got in trouble once. Then my parents told me not to climb again.

e.p: Would you tell this story to your kids?
e.m: 1) Nói bạn sẽ hay không bằng 'I will'/'I wouldn't'. 2) Giải thích lý do ngắn.
e.s: I will tell it because it's a fun lesson about being careful. Kids will laugh and learn.

e.p: Which memory is better: this one or a school trip?
e.m: 1) So sánh ngắn (better/worse). 2) Nói lý do ngắn sử dụng 'and' hoặc 'but'.
e.s: This memory is better than the school trip because it was more personal and scary. But both were fun.

d.t: Giải quyết hiểu lầm bằng cách dùng từ thông dụng

e.p: I thought you said 3pm, not 4pm.
e.m: 1) Thừa nhận hoặc giải thích ngắn (I thought/No, I said...). 2) Nói việc bạn sẽ làm để sửa (future).
e.s: I thought you said 3pm too. I will check the message and call you.

e.p: Someone says 'we got our wires crossed' — what does it mean?
e.m: 1) Giải thích thành ngữ đơn giản. 2) Nói bạn sẽ làm gì để tránh lần sau (should/plan).
e.s: It means we misunderstood each other. We should confirm plans next time.

e.p: Do you have to apologize now?
e.m: 1) Nói có/không bằng 'I have to' or 'I don't have to'. 2) Nói lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use 'I have to' / 'I don't have to' + because
e.s: I have to apologize because the other person waited. It's the polite thing to do.

e.p: How will you fix the mistake at work?
e.m: 1) Nói cách bạn sẽ sửa (I will + verb). 2) Nói kết quả mong muốn ngắn (so/and).
e.s: I will correct the report and send a new version. So everyone has the right information.

e.p: Is this issue worse than last week's problem?
e.m: 1) So sánh ngắn (worse/better). 2) Nói lý do ngắn với 'because'.
e.s: This issue is worse than last week's because it affects more people. It needs quick action.

d.t: Tỏ ý từ chối lịch sự với tiếng lóng nhẹ

e.p: Do you want to come to the concert tonight?
e.m: 1) Từ chối nhẹ nhàng hoặc đồng ý (I can't / I will). 2) Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.s: I can't come tonight because I have to study. Maybe next time.

e.p: Someone said 'no hard feelings' after a decline. What does it mean?
e.m: 1) Giải thích cụm từ đơn giản. 2) Nói bạn có đồng ý với điều đó (yes/no) và lý do.
e.s: It means there is no anger or problem between us. I agree because it's a friendly answer.

e.p: If you must refuse, what should you say?
e.m: 1) Viết một câu từ chối lịch sự bằng 'I can't' hoặc 'I'm sorry'. 2) Nói lời đề nghị thay thế (offer).
e.s: I'm sorry, I can't join tonight. I can meet for coffee this weekend instead.

e.p: Would you rather stay home or go out tonight?
e.m: 1) Nói lựa chọn (stay home/go out). 2) Nêu lý do ngắn with comparative.
e.s: I'd rather stay home than go out because it's quieter and cheaper. I need rest.

e.p: How do you end the conversation politely after refusing?
e.m: 1) Viết câu chốt ngắn (connector 'and' or 'so'). 2) Nói mong muốn tương lai (will).
e.s: Thank you for understanding and I hope we can meet soon. I will contact you next week.

d.t: Ôn tập: Kết hợp gặp gỡ, khen ngợi và xin lỗi

e.p: Hi, nice to meet you. What's your name?
e.m: 1) Nói tên bạn. 2) Nói cảm xúc khi gặp người mới (excited/relaxed).
e.h: Present Simple: My name is... + I feel...
e.s: I'm [studentName]. I feel excited to meet new people.

e.p: You helped with the event and someone said 'great job' — how do you reply?
e.m: 1) Cảm ơn ngắn. 2) Nói bạn sẽ làm gì lần sau (future).
e.s: Thank you, I appreciate it. I will help again next time.

e.p: You arrived late and need to apologize. Say sorry and give a reason.
e.m: 1) Xin lỗi ngắn (Past Simple). 2) Nói lý do và hành động tiếp theo (will).
e.s: I'm sorry I was late because of traffic. I will leave earlier tomorrow.

e.p: Someone used the slang 'no biggie' after an apology. What does it mean?
e.m: 1) Giải thích 'no biggie' đơn giản. 2) Nói nếu bạn nghĩ vậy (yes/no) và lý do.
e.s: It means it's not a problem or it's okay. I agree because the issue was small.

e.p: How would you end a short chat politely?
e.m: 1) Viết câu chốt (goodbye/see you). 2) Nói khi gặp lại bằng 'see you' + time or plan.
e.s: See you later and have a good day. I'll see you at the meeting tomorrow.

d.t: Ôn tập: Ăn uống, mua sắm và dùng idioms

e.p: Can I get the bill please?
e.m: 1) Trả lời bạn sẽ mang bill (I will). 2) Nói cách thanh toán (cash/card).
e.s: I will bring the bill right away. I will pay by card.

e.p: You heard 'a steal' about a jacket. Say if you will buy it.
e.m: 1) Nói bạn có mua hay không (I will/I won't). 2) Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.s: I will buy it because the price is very low. It's a good deal.

e.p: At a restaurant someone says 'the food hit the spot'. What does it mean?
e.m: 1) Giải thích idiom ngắn. 2) Nói nếu bạn đồng ý và nêu lý do.
e.s: It means the food satisfied your hunger or craving. I agree because the meal was exactly what I needed.

e.p: If an item is cheaper online, what should you check?
e.m: 1) Nói thứ bạn nên kiểm tra (shipping/size). 2) Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.s: You should check shipping costs and the size chart. They can change the final price or fit.

e.p: Would you rather eat at home or dine out this weekend?
e.m: 1) Nói lựa chọn của bạn. 2) Nêu lý do ngắn (more comfortable/cheaper).
e.s: I'd rather dine out than eat at home because it's more relaxing. It's a fun change.

d.t: Ôn tập: Ứng xử văn hoá, lời khuyên và giải quyết vấn đề

e.p: Someone invited you to their home; what should you bring?
e.m: 1) Nói món bạn sẽ mang (gift/food). 2) Nói lý do ngắn (respect/thank).
e.s: I will bring a small dessert. It's a polite way to say thank you.

e.p: If a plan changes 'out of the blue', how do you react?
e.m: 1) Nói phản ứng đầu tiên (surprised/calm). 2) Nói kế hoạch mới ngắn (will).
e.s: I was surprised but stayed calm. I will make a new plan with the team.

e.p: Should people learn local customs when they travel?
e.m: 1) Trả lời nên/không bằng 'Yes, they should' hoặc 'No'. 2) Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.s: Yes, they should because it shows respect and avoids mistakes. It makes the trip smoother.

e.p: How do you fix a small problem between friends?
e.m: 1) Nói bước đầu bằng 'talk' hoặc 'apologize'. 2) Nói kết quả bạn muốn (so/and).
e.s: Talk honestly and apologize if needed. So the friendship can continue peacefully.

e.p: Which is more important: following rules or being flexible?
e.m: 1) Chọn một và dùng comparative. 2) Nêu lý do ngắn, có connector 'but' hoặc 'and'.
e.s: Following rules is more important than always being flexible because rules keep order. But flexibility helps in special situations.
